title: PostgreSQL Cutover Runbook
acceptance_criteria: Runbook contains 9-step cutover sequence matching SPEC-T233 section 8.2
Runbook contains rollback section with exact env var revert commands
30-day retention reminder and volume destruction calendar note included
summary: Comprehensive operator-friendly runbook for production cutover from SQLite to PostgreSQL. Includes T-30min to T+1hr timeline with pre-flight checks, maintenance mode, migration script execution with verification, health checks (5 smoke tests), 1-hour monitoring, rollback path with detailed recovery checklist, and post-cutover 30-day snapshot retention task creation. Scannable at 3am under stress. All commands copy-pasteable from Railway dashboard. Known risks (concurrent writes, connection pool exhaustion, timezone shifts, boolean conversion) documented with mitigations. References SPEC-T233 section 8.2 and ADR-T233 section D6 for design authority.

TF-IDF preserved as fallback. No external APIs.

title: forge-ts OpenAPI 3.2 + Swagger UI + Postman collection
summary: Wired forge-ts to generate OpenAPI 3.2 spec from @route TSDoc tags. Created src/openapi-manifest.ts with 80 exported stub functions covering all 68 API routes. Installed @forge-ts/core, @forge-ts/api, @fastify/swagger, @fastify/swagger-ui. Added openapi:gen script with post-processor that recovers {param} notation (TSDoc strips braces). Swagger UI served at /api/docs, raw spec at /api/openapi.json. Postman collection (11 folders) generated via openapi-to-postmanv2. CI drift gate added (openapi-drift job). Docs site spec page at /docs/api/spec. tsc clean.
notes: Deferred: /api/docs live curl verification (requires deployed service). Known limitation: forge-ts strips {param} braces from @route tags via TSDoc link parsing; postprocess-openapi.mjs compensates by matching param names to path segments.
